Class Suggestion

java.lang.Object
com.cluegame.model.Suggestion
Direct Known Subclasses:
Accusation
public class Suggestion extends Object
Represents a suggestion made by a player during their turn. A suggestion names a suspect, a weapon and the room the player is currently in. Other players must disprove it by showing a matching card if they can.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

    Returns the room the murder is suggested to have occurred in.

  • Constructor Details

    • Suggestion

      public Suggestion(SuspectCard suspect, WeaponCard weapon, RoomCard room)
      Constructs a Suggestion with the given suspect, weapon and room.
      Parameters:
      suspect - the suspected murderer
      weapon - the suspected murder weapon
      room - the room the murder is suggested to have occurred in

      the suspect card

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a human-readable description of this suggestion.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      string in the format "Suspect in the Room with the Weapon"
